required_fields.why_required: A target-status or antigen-density statement changes meaning when the assay platform, staining method, sequencing method, or quantitative method changes.
Bone marrow, plasmacytoma, blood, model, and normal-tissue measurements are not interchangeable.

required_fields.field_label: Threshold, scoring method, or detection limit
required_fields.why_required: Low, negative, absent, detectable, and molecules-per-cell statements need source-defined scoring or detection context before comparison.
Pre-treatment, relapse, progression, post-exposure, and paired samples support different interpretations.
A paired pre/post or blood/marrow context can support a different statement than an unpaired measurement.
A measurement near relapse or progression should preserve how the source defines that disease state.
Public artifacts should tell readers which context is absent before any later claim uses the measurement.

measurement_focus: bone marrow or plasmacytoma BCMA expression
missing_context_notes: The v0 extraction captures immunohistochemistry, specimen source, pre-teclistamab timing, and paired pre-initial-BCMA-therapy context.
It does not preserve a detailed IHC scoring threshold, sample adequacy rule, or full response-assessment method.
It preserves 3 of 50 as source-cohort target-assessment denominator context, not as a general frequency estimate.
action_needed: Keep denominator_context fields attached to target-status signals.
Do not compare this target-status signal to antigen-density signals without scoring and timing context.
does_not_support: Does not recommend target testing, treatment selection, or sequencing.
Does not estimate BCMA loss frequency across all BCMA-directed therapy recipients.

missing_context_notes: The v0 extraction captures peripheral blood and marrow pairing but does not preserve the soluble-BCMA assay method, dilution, threshold, detection limit, or relapse/progression definition.
The measurement should remain candidate context rather than a standalone rule.
action_needed: Add assay method, detection-limit, and timing fields before soluble BCMA is compared across sources.
Keep soluble BCMA separate from marrow target-status interpretation.
does_not_support: Does not support patient-specific soluble-BCMA interpretation.
Does not support using soluble BCMA as a standalone diagnostic or treatment-selection rule.

measurement_focus: Low-to-negative BCMA expression after BCMA CAR T relapse
missing_context_notes: The v0 extraction captures post-BCMA CAR T relapse framing but not the assay method, specimen source, threshold, scoring method, paired measurement context, or source-defined relapse definition.
The v0 public audit uses the current public extraction and public source record, so method details remain incomplete unless verified from an accessible source.
action_needed: Do not use this low-BCMA signal for cross-source comparison until assay and specimen context are extracted.
Separate low-BCMA target context from any claim about SEMA4A-directed intervention efficacy.
does_not_support: Does not infer patient-level actionability from low BCMA expression.

missing_context_notes: The v0 extraction captures molecules-per-cell and paired target-density comparison language but not the assay platform, specimen source, source-defined threshold, cohort denominator, or relapse/progression definition.
Target density and normal-tissue reactivity must stay separated from clinical efficacy or safety claims.
action_needed: Extract assay platform, cohort denominator, specimen source, and normal-tissue comparison context before any structured comparison.
does_not_support: Does not prove SEMA4A-directed CAR T therapy works in patients.

measurement_focus: assay type and specimen context as required extraction fields
missing_context_notes: The claim correctly says assay type, specimen context, and prior BCMA exposure should be extracted, but the claim text itself is not a full measurement record.
The linked extraction record must carry the detailed measurement context before the claim is reused.
action_needed: Keep this claim tied to extraction records that preserve denominator and measurement context.
Do not let a measurement term alone stand in for assay and specimen detail.
does_not_support: Does not support clinical target verification guidance.
Does not support selecting a BCMA-directed therapy.

missing_context_notes: The claim remains an open-question research-tracking claim and lacks full assay, specimen, threshold, paired-measurement, and relapse-definition context.
Normal-tissue reactivity and target density are linked measurement terms but do not establish clinical safety or efficacy.
action_needed: Keep the claim at open-question status until source methods and translation status are extracted.
Do not compare SEMA4A and BCMA density across sources without assay context.
does_not_support: Does not claim SEMA4A-directed CAR T works in patients.
Does not recommend testing, treatment, or trial participation.

review_notes: Audits current public extraction and claim records for measurement-context completeness.
Does not convert measurement context into medical advice, product comparison, or frequency estimate.
